modality_1.description: Key of the first modality in the MuData object (e.g. 'rna').

modality_2.description: Key of the second modality in the MuData object (e.g. 'msi').

n_neighbors.description: Number of nearest neighbors for each modality's KNN graph.

n_pcs_per_modality.description: Number of PCA components to compute per modality before WNN.

umap_color_type.description: Column in .obs used to color the UMAP plot.
